The following events took place in '''27,500 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]]'''.

==Events==
*The [[Human/Legends|Human]] natives of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] begin to launch sublight [[Sleeper ship/Legends|sleeper ships]] over the next fifteen hundred [[Standard year/Legends|years]], seeding a number of worlds with Humans. These include [[Kuat/Legends|Kuat]], [[Metellos/Legends|Metellos]], [[Csilla/Legends|Csilla]], [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]], [[Empress Teta/Legends|Koros Major]], [[Rendili/Legends|Rendili]], and the [[Tion Cluster/Legends|Tion Cluster]].<ref name="Atlas">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> The Humans also launch the ''[[Kuat Explorer]]'', which colonizes the planet [[Alsakan/Legends|Alsakan]].<ref name="Corporate">''[[Han Solo and the Corporate Sector Sourcebook]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' {{Codex}}
